task_description: Express warm, inclusive encouragement to a new colleague during onboarding while reinforcing team support and psychological safety.

example.title: 欢迎新同事
example.scenario: Lisa, a seasoned team member, warmly welcomes Ryan, a newly onboarded colleague, over lunch in the office cafeteria.

messages.english: Starting a new job can feel overwhelming at first — we’ve all been there. Our team is really supportive, and you’re always welcome to ask questions, anytime.
messages.chinese: 刚开始一份新工作总会有点压力——我们都经历过。我们团队非常支持彼此，你随时都可以来提问。

messages.userPrompt: 我很感激大家的友善，也想尽快为团队做点贡献。

reference.answer: I truly appreciate everyone’s kindness — I’m also eager to contribute meaningfully to the team as soon as possible.

messages.english: That’s exactly the spirit we love! We value both your fresh perspective and your willingness to learn — growth happens together.
messages.chinese: 这正是我们最欣赏的态度！我们既看重你的新视角，也珍视你的学习意愿——成长从来都是共同发生的。

messages.userPrompt: 谢谢！能加入这样一个轻松又靠谱的团队，真的让我很安心。

reference.answer: Thank you! It really puts my mind at ease knowing I’m joining such a relaxed yet reliable team.
